name: typescript7-demo
description: Reproducible repo comparing TypeScript 6 with the TypeScript 7.0 native preview.

scripts.bench:all: npm run bench && npm run bench:tuning && npm run bench:synthetic && npm run bench:public
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck:ts6 && npm run typecheck:ts7 && npm run typecheck:isolated && npm run typecheck:oss:ts6 && npm run typecheck:oss:ts7 && npm test
scripts.bench:full: npm run bench && npm run bench:tuning && npm run bench:synthetic && npm run bench:public && npm run scan:migration && npm run report && npm run site:data && npm run history:update
scripts.verify:fast: npm run typecheck:ts6 && npm run typecheck:ts7 && npm run typecheck:oss:ts6 && npm run typecheck:oss:ts7 && npm test

author: Juan Torchia
